Adapter evidence validation is closed/self-hashed/exact-live and participates in the operator critical graph and execute/continue HEAD evidence gate. Preview executable assertions bind stable generic surfaces, complete target identity/bytes, and append-tolerant authorization prefix/dev/ino/header/session ID; strace supplies operator no-write evidence. Settings generation is byte-gated before dossier/preview overwrite and preserves all non-v2 deep semantics. The cooperative settings CAS still honestly retains the non-cooperative writer race residual. No live write, execute/continue, rollback, commit, or push occurred; S2 and aggregate P3 remain NOT_AUTHORIZED / separate_authorization_required.

transitions.title: hub dogfood retirement
transitions.current: Retired by owner decision on 2026-07-22. Adoption was extremely low; the sole material judgment was final_verdict=human_better, and the task -> hub -> worker path imposed two lossy retellings. Direct dispatch_agent/dispatch_parallel primitives are sufficient. Runtime, settings, and dogfood evaluation entrypoints were removed. The historical ledger remains immutable evidence and must not grow.
exit: dispatch_hub runtime and settings surfaces are removed
hub-specific dogfood, oracle, smoke, and judgment backfill entrypoints are removed
historical ADR, audit, and ledger evidence is retained without further growth
evidence: ADR 0030 historical baseline and 2026-07-22 retirement summary
transitions.next_action: Keep the transition closed. Do not resume material backfill or restore a hub runtime without a new owner decision and a new ADR.
